description: Dynamic bridge — 2026-05-11 morning_brief — re-escalation partial reversal, Brent back above $100

market_regime.label: RE_ESCALATION_PARTIAL_REVERSAL_CRUDE_BACK_ABOVE_100
market_regime.key_risk: Brent back above $100 on weekend US-Iran tension flare-up. Iran-US MoU framework durability now questioned.
market_regime.note: Weekend re-escalation: Brent crude jumped from $99.10 (May 7 close, sub-$100) back to $101-105 range on renewed US-Iran tensions / UAE incidents. Nifty opened 24,165.90 on May 11 (essentially flat from Friday close 24,176.15). The crude normalization thesis from May 6-7 is partially reversing. Defense premium (M012) reactivating. P041 (NIFTY 24,300-24,600 by May 12) now at risk — needs +0.55% to enter range in 1.5 sessions, unlikely given re-escalation drag.

key_drivers: EOD wrap for 2026-05-07 was last successful end-of-day run; no EOD wraps executed for May 8, 9, or 10.
No opening_bias forecast was generated for the May 11 session.

session_direction.key_assumption: Re-escalation regime: Brent crude rebounded from sub-$100 (May 7 low $99.10) back to $101-105 area on renewed US-Iran tensions/UAE incidents over the weekend. The crude normalization thesis from May 6-7 is partially reversing. Open at 24,165.90 (flat from May 8 close 24,176.15) suggests muted positioning — neither relief continuation nor panic. Friday was already bearish (-0.62%), and BankNifty closed -1.31% at 55,310.55 going into the weekend — banking weakness should continue absent a fresh positive catalyst. P041 target (NIFTY 24,300-24,600 by May 12) is now at risk — Nifty needs +0.55% in 1.5 sessions to enter range. DII buying floor at 24,000-24,100 should hold barring a sharp crude spike. Re-escalation = defense premium returns (M012 active again).
session_direction.brent_forecast: $100-108 range. Brent ~$101-105 currently (search noise on exact level). If formal escalation/Hormuz incident escalates → $108-115 zone. If diplomacy resumes → falls back to $97-100. Wide range reflects regime volatility.

scenarios.name: CHOPPY_FLAT_TO_DOWN (40%)
scenarios.description: Brent stays $100-105. Nifty drifts in 24,100-24,250 band, BankNifty 55,000-55,500. FII cautious, DII supports. Close near flat to -0.3%.

scenarios.name: BEARISH_RE_ESCALATION (30%)
scenarios.description: Brent breaks above $107 on fresh Iran headlines. OMC/aviation hit, banking weak. Nifty tests 24,000-24,050 support. Defense (ASTRA, COCHINSHIP) rallies on premium return. Close -0.5% to -1.0%.

scenarios.name: RELIEF_BOUNCE (20%)
scenarios.description: Diplomatic news flow improves intraday; Brent falls back to $98-100. BankNifty short-covering rallies. Nifty pushes toward 24,300 (P041 lower bound). Close +0.3-0.5%.

scenarios.name: BREAKOUT_RALLY_OUTSIDE_BASE (10%)
scenarios.description: Formal Iran-US deal announcement OR major positive headline. Brent crashes to $93-95. Nifty surges past 24,300, tests 24,400-24,500. P041 enters range strongly.

session_direction.key_assumption: Nifty at 24326.65 has consolidated post-regime-shift gains. Brent sub-$100 is structurally bullish for India. FII reversal to net buying (May MTD Rs 2,835 cr) provides demand floor. Friday sessions tend toward cautious positioning but crude normalization + Iran peace framework gives mild upside bias. BankNifty at 56047.4 holding above 56,000 — P045 target (55,000-56,000 by May 9) already CORRECT. Support at 24,200 (yesterday's low region), resistance at 24,400-24,500 (50-DMA zone). Defense stocks showing V-shaped recovery (ASTRA +6.83%) — sector rotation not as linear as expected.
